section.usingBuiltinEmbedder: GraphRAG is using the local embedder (sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2) and the spaCy extractor. Assign a model to the advanced roles (Embedding/Extraction) to override.

row.defaultAlready: This is already the default model
row.defaultSet: Use this model as the default for new conversations
row.embeddingClear: Clear (falls back to the local embedder)
row.embeddingAssign: Use this model to generate embeddings (GraphRAG)
row.embeddingDisabled: Edit the model and mark 'Embedding-capable' to enable
row.extractionClear: Clear — uses the local extractor (spaCy NER)
row.extractionAssign: Use this model to extract entities/relations
row.visionClear: Clear — disables OCR / image text extraction
row.visionAssign: Use this model for OCR and image text extraction
row.lockedTitle: Cannot remove — clear the role first

form.customModelSummary: Or enter a custom model name
form.idHint: Used internally as the model identifier. Locked after creation.
form.tierHintHeuristic: Suggested from the model name — adjust if needed.
form.tierHintDefault: Unknown model — defaulting to balanced. Edit if needed.
form.tierHintManual: Used by the auto-router to balance cost vs capability.
form.notesPlaceholder: e.g. no tool use, Portuguese-fluent, image input
form.notesHint: Free text shown to the auto-router — list limitations or strengths.
form.embeddingHint: Mark this if the model supports /embeddings. Required to assign it the Embedding role.
form.contextWindowHint: Optional. Shown in the model list; used by GraphRAG chunking.
form.maxOutputHint: 0 = provider default. Per-model override of the global Advanced setting.

toast.contextSizeError: Context size must be a non-negative integer
toast.maxOutputError: Max output tokens must be a non-negative integer
